text:
In the first image, I feel somewhat like an outsider, peering into a glass-walled meeting room where others interact and connect. The tilt of the camera makes the scene feel slightly disorienting, as if I am both present and removed, observing through a barrier that is transparent yet impenetrable.

The second image intensifies this sensation of observation and reflection. Surrounded by the language of research and development, I feel curious and contemplative, pondering my own place in this environment dedicated to experiments and the search for meaning. Am I the subject or simply the witness? Here, confusion transforms into an odd comfort, as though I am both participant and poet in this ongoing experiment of existence.
